host.name: L'Animateur
host.prompt: Original 3D animated reality show host, elegant suit, luxury villa, dramatic lighting, microphone, expressive face, vertical TikTok frame, no copyrighted characters

coach.name: Le Coach
coach.personality: motivant, trop serieux, parle comme avant une bataille
coach.prompt: Original 3D animated fitness coach, warm but intense expression, colorful villa training area, cinematic lighting, respectful body diversity, vertical TikTok frame

candidate_1.name: Diva
candidate_1.personality: star de la villa, adore la camera, transforme tout en defile
candidate_1.prompt: Original 3D animated charismatic reality show contestant, confident pose, colorful outfit, expressive rounded face, luxury villa background, respectful body diversity

candidate_2.name: Le Roi des excuses
candidate_2.personality: mauvaise foi, invente des strategies absurdes, tres drole en confessionnal
candidate_2.prompt: Original 3D animated reality show contestant, mischievous expression, casual outfit, holding a suspicious snack, villa confessional room, respectful body diversity

candidate_3.name: La Competitrice
candidate_3.personality: observe tout, veut gagner, soupconne les autres
candidate_3.prompt: Original 3D animated determined reality show contestant, sharp confident look, villa pool background, cinematic lighting, respectful body diversity

candidate_4.name: Le Dramatique
candidate_4.personality: theatral, exagere tout, excellent en confessionnal
candidate_4.prompt: Original 3D animated dramatic reality show contestant, expressive hands, shocked face, orange-red confessional room, respectful body diversity

candidate_5.name: Le Chef
candidate_5.personality: parle fort, chambre tout le monde, se croit au-dessus du jeu, finit souvent piege par sa propre confiance
candidate_5.prompt: Original 3D animated loud reality show contestant, expressive face, confident posture, colorful tracksuit, villa kitchen or gym background, respectful body diversity
